title: 大阪杯の後に・タマモクロスの予告

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creeks runs her race with an air of
confidence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Tamamo Cross boastfully informs her that she
has identified her weakness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wondering what her weakness could be, she
begins to prepare for the spring Tenno Sho.
